_note: ComfyUI API-format graph for a REAL GPU background inpaint using FLUX.1 Fill dev (quantized GGUF) + an ~8-step turbo/hyper LoRA. Inputs: a source image (node 5, LoadImage) and a binary removal mask (node 6, LoadImage -> ImageToMask). Output: an inpainted RGB image (node 14, SaveImage). src/qwen_worker.py::flux_inpaint() uploads image+mask, patches nodes by class_type + _meta.title, submits /prompt, polls /history, and downloads node 14 outputs. Mask convention: WHITE = the region to regenerate (matches src/inpaint build_union_mask). Model files are deliberately easy to swap: change the *_name inputs below, or override via config inpaint.comfy.models.{unet_gguf,t5xxl,clip_l,vae,lora}. REQUIRED on the ComfyUI box: (1) custom node pack ComfyUI-GGUF for UnetLoaderGGUF -> `cd ComfyUI/custom_nodes && git clone https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF && <comfy-python> -m pip install gguf`. (2) models via scripts/setup_flux_inpaint.ps1: models/unet/flux1-fill-dev-Q4_K_S.gguf (~6.8GB, from YarvixPA/FLUX.1-Fill-dev-gguf), models/clip/t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors (~4.9GB) + models/clip/clip_l.safetensors (~246MB, from comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders), models/vae/ae.safetensors (~335MB, Flux VAE from black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell), models/loras/flux1-turbo-alpha.safetensors (~694MB, from alimama-creative/FLUX.1-Turbo-Alpha). 16GB-VRAM-safe: fp8 T5 + Q4_K_M GGUF ~= 12-13GB resident. Guidance defaults to 30 (Flux Fill dev native); with the turbo LoRA some users drop it to ~3.5 -- tune via inpaint.comfy.guidance. Steps default 8 / cfg 1.0 for the turbo LoRA (tune via inpaint.comfy.steps / .cfg). If node names differ on your ComfyUI build, this file is the thing to edit.
